# Agent Maturity Compass (AMC)

> The credit score for AI agents. Open-source framework for scoring AI agent trustworthiness from execution evidence.

## Docs
- [Getting Started](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#GETTING_STARTED)
- [Architecture](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#ARCHITECTURE_MAP)
- [CLI Reference](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#CLI_WRAPPERS)
- [API Reference](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#API_SURFACES)
- [Adapters](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#ADAPTERS)
- [Security](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#SECURITY)
- [EU AI Act Compliance](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#EU_AI_ACT_COMPLIANCE)
- [Scoring & Dimensions](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#DIAGNOSTIC_BANK)
- [Governance](https://thewisecrab.github.io/AgentMaturityCompass/docs/#GOVERNANCE)

## Install
npm i -g agent-maturity-compass

## Quick Score
amc init && amc quickscore --share

## Key Concepts
- L0-L5 maturity scale based on execution evidence
- Ed25519 + Merkle tree cryptographic proof chains
- 140 core diagnostic questions, 5 trust dimensions
- 14 framework adapters (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, etc.)
- Evidence trust tiers: SELF_REPORTED (0.4x), OBSERVED (1.0x), CRYPTOGRAPHIC (1.0x)
